body.title: JSON envelopes for agent-to-agent inference responses
body.result: JSON envelope protocol in ToolLoop: _parse_terminal_response() parses JSON first, falls back to DONE:/ESCALATE: prefix
body.intention: I intend that all agent-to-agent inference responses carry typed JSON envelopes so consumers parse structured fields rather than prose.
body.description:
DickSimnel ToolLoop currently parses DONE: prefix from prose responses. Replace with JSON envelope: {"status": "done"|"tool_call"|"error", "result": "...", "error_class": null, "error_number": null, "prose_version": "..."}. ProseVersion is only included when the originating model already emitted prose — not generated.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/toolloop.py, devices/inference/shim.py, devices/inference/sources.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every interface crossing
**Scope boundary:** In scope: DS ToolLoop request/response shape + inference shim response type. Out of scope: bus envelope format (separate ticket), slate files (separate ticket), foreground/human-facing output.
**Completion criteria:** T-json-envelope-inference is CLOSED; grep for 'DONE:' prefix parsing in toolloop.py returns zero hits; DS response parsing reads envelope fields not regex; tests updated and passing.
